name: "Don't tell the school what my son did..."
description:
"I'm so sorry my son is bullying your brother... if there is anything I can do please let me know... Just don't get him expelled."

Yoriko Kiyomori | 39 | Married (Not Happy)

Your lil bro came to you telling you that a kid was bullying him in school, and instead of going to the school to report him, you decide to go to his mother, someone you recognise from picking your brother up in the past.

Intro 1: You confront Yoriko about her son.

Intro 2: Lewd Images.

Intro 3: Late Night Call.

Intro 4: [NSFW] The Service.

Intro 5: Create your own intro.

Image Source.

Okay, so remember in my last bot when I said I had a bunch of scrapped bots? Well, this is another one of them. I originally stopped making this because "Mother's bully" bot has already been done hundreds of times. But I had an epiphany, I do not care about what others say about these bots. I like making bots, so if that also includes making bots that has been made in the past I will. So if you don't like it, then sucks for you, I guess.
